title: Celsius CEO Discusses Doubling Sales, Soaring Stock
description: Celsius soared after posting sales which more than doubled from a year earlier following its acquisition of Alani Nu, allaying concerns that a change in distribution channels would disrupt sales. CEO John Fieldly joins "Bloomberg Markets" to discuss the revenue surge, consumer habits and branding.  (Source: Bloomberg)
